heroBenefits: ✅ Scan your media before it backfires
✅ AI checks for video, audio & images

about.title: About CheckReel
about.content: CheckReel is part of Alwafer Media, specializing in social-media management, AI-driven apps and precision marketing campaigns. We help creators scan videos, images and audio for policy violations before they post — saving time, protecting brands and avoiding strikes or bans.
